candidate_definition_hints.text: Bi-directional Attention Flow (BiDAF) network is a multi-stage hierarchical process that represents context at different levels of granularity and uses a bi-directional attention flow mechanism to achieve a query-aware context representation without early summarization.
- This the original implementation of [Bi-directional Attention Flow for Machine Comprehension][paper].

candidate_glosses.text: - This the original implementation of [Bi-directional Attention Flow for Machine Comprehension][paper].

source_repo_description: Bi-directional Attention Flow (BiDAF) network is a multi-stage hierarchical process that represents context at different levels of granularity and uses a bi-directional attention flow mechanism to achieve a query-aware context representation without early summarization.
